_doc: Manual coordinate corrections for stations mis-geocoded in Cain's station_coordinates.json (venue name correct, coordinate wrong due to same-name collisions). Keyed semel -> venue string (as it appears in ballot_locations) -> [lat, lng]. Verified via web search of the real street address + Nominatim/MOE-registry + PIP. Applied in build_coords_18.py, build_statarea_2008era.py, build_statarea_modern.py (overrides the venue-index coord). Detected by analysis/detect_misgeocode_18.py (2009 era) and analysis/detect_misgeocode_modern.py (K21-25 x 2022 census).
_verification_2026_07_05: K25 sweep: 32 flags -> 8 confirmed (below), 24 cleared as false positives or unverifiable. FP pattern: Haredi/Shas enclaves & Mizrahi-traditional voters inside plurality-secular SAs (PT beit-yaakov Rothschild 64, Netanya naomi-shemer, Arad halamish, Ashdod makif-a, Nof-HaGalil gan-gefen all confirmed correctly placed via MOE registry/address geocode). Unverifiable (no address evidence, not injected): Akko beit-heiman, Ofakim pais club, Jerusalem morasha (Cain coord ~correct, mixed area), Haifa hadar-beitenu.
_verification_2026_07_05b: TA bi"s HaYarden (ballots 739/740/749/754/756): user-reported phantom SA 50000511 (central-TA coast, 75% rh profile). Cain OSM-matched osm_name 'הירדן' near Ben Yehuda/Trumpeldor (32.074098,34.766528). Real school = MOE registry semel_mosad 511337 at (32.050680,34.793391), accuracy 'very high', HaTikva/Ezra area; corroborated by MOE gan cluster 70m away AND by the 2006 CEC address geocode (32.051154,34.794136, 60m away) already used correctly by K16/K17. Fix moves votes to SA 50000933 (2008 geo) / 50001014 (2022 geo). Affects K18-K20 + K21-K25; K16/K17 were already correct.
_verification_2026_07_05c: Herzliya K24 blue-island audit (user-reported): CONFIRMED gordon + wolfson mis-geocodes. (1) בי"ס יסודי גורדון: Cain (32.16009,34.85151)=SA 122 vs MOE 510404 (32.16401,34.85559) acc 'very high' = SA 113, 580m; Gordon's 6 ballots vote rh 51.2% (Neve Amal electorate) — fix flips K24 SA 64000122 מחל->פה and reinforces SA 113. (2) בי"ס יסודי וולפסון: Cain (32.16319,34.84356)=SA 133 (OSM matched Wolfson St, west-central) vs real school at מורדי הגטאות 58 Neve Amal = MOE 512210 (32.16964,34.86005) acc 'very high' = SA 112, 1.7km; confirmed by Nominatim address geocode + Waze/allschool. Fix flips K24 SA 64000133 מחל->פה, SA 64000112 becomes voted (rh ~40, Likud — consistent w/ Neve Amal). CLEARED as correct (no fix): לב טוב (registry name 'לב-טוב' 512665, רבי עקיבא 7 = Cain's point), רמב"ם (registry 'רמבם מד' 510461, 110m), נתיב (90m), ויצמן (120m), אולפנת צביה הרצליה (80m, city has its own — no namesake injection), תיכון מקיף הראשונים (110m). Also verified REAL (not bugs): red island 3460001 = Kibbutz Glil Yam (Labor 30%, 276 votes), SA 64000123 Netiv right-pocket (ballot 127 rh 58%), SA 134/131 (venues correct; K24 vote-splitting genuine).
_verification_2026_07_06: National sweep round 1 (winner-vs-hood detector, K24∪K25: 111 flags -> 31 census-contradicting -> MOE+address verification). 6 CONFIRMED: (1) TA בי"ס הגליל: osm 'הגליל' Florentin (32.0610,34.7788) vs real school גבעתי 4 HaTikva = MOE 511279 (32.050581,34.796039) acc very-high, nominatim 80m concurs. (2) TA בי"ס עציון: osm matched 'עולי ציון' Jaffa (32.0540,34.7559) vs real ממ"ד עציון ברנפלד 15 Yad Eliyahu = MOE 511949 (32.060838,34.802929); crosscheck alt + nominatim EXACT concur — triple. (3) TA תפארת יוסף(תלמוד תורה): google matched the Neve Sharett SYNAGOGUE namesake (32.1166,34.8403) vs real ת"ת דרך ההגנה 106 HaTikva = MOE 514836 (32.053218,34.794375); 2006 CEC address for ballot 6840 = 'דרך ההגנה 106' — period-true proof. (4) Ashdod בי"ס יצחק רבין: osm matched 'רבינא' (31.7908,34.6667, Haredi rova) vs real סירקין 2 = MOE 614875 (31.772099,34.631889), nominatim 130m. (5) PT מתנ"ס הדרים: osm 'נחל הדרים' (32.1160,34.8550, outside ANY SA) — ballot family 309.x sits at Beit Yaakov compound (309.0-.6 there, rh 90-98): fix to (32.088066,34.880373) SA 79000712, building approximate, electorate-continuity based. (6) PT תיכון יצחק שמיר: osm Shamir-street (32.1041,34.8638) vs real האחים בכר 3 = MOE 711051 (32.097304,34.88055), nominatim 60m. CLEARED as enclaves/correct: KS מועדון עציון (Rav Gold 14, 80m), RG מתנ"ס רמת שקמה (שלם 32 same SA), RG נטעים/אורט אבין, PT בית יעקב cluster (0.04km), Haifa נירים, KS מפתן, Akko אייל. OPEN (ambiguous, next round): PT בי"ס קרול (address הבנים 5 vs MOE 2.15km apart — campus relocation?), Ra'anana מועדון השחר + מרכז קהילתי קשת (clubs, no registry), Haifa עופרים/נווה דוד interlock, PT בי"ס אדר, Ramla חב"ד, J-m גן שפה + בניין המכינה, TA קהילת יעקב/רש"י/נופים/תל חי/המשותף, Ashdod לוי אשכול/מתחם גנים, Rehovot ת"ת חב"ד.
_verification_2026_07_06b: Venue-level sweep (dots layer made these visible; user spotted the central-TLV Likud dot = Tel Hai). Detector: venue rh vs 6-nearest same-city venues ≤1.5km, |Δ|≥35, ≥250 votes → 64 flags K25 / 66 K24 → registry+address+profile verification. 8 venues CONFIRMED (10 strings): (1-3) TA בי"ס תל חי (3 strings: כניסה ראשית/אולם ספורט/סניף): Cain in Dizengoff center (32.0772,34.7759) vs MOE 513044 (32.0530,34.8096) 4.15km, voters rh 57 = SE-TA ✓. (4) TA בי"ס רוקח: Bavli (32.0988) vs MOE 511642 (32.05655,34.79643) 4.76km — crosscheck alt 120m from registry, double-confirmed. (5) TA בי"ס עמיאל: 3 namesakes; voters rh 66.8 match עמיאל-רמב"ם מד 511931 (32.04639,34.79355) south, not Bavli. (6) TA תיכון שושנה דמארי: MOE 581447 (32.11678,34.81716) Neot Afeka, 6.35km; voters rh 17 ✓. (7) TA בי"ס תיכון י"א: MOE 540518 (32.09285,34.78687) Bavli — Rokach and Ironi-YA had SWAPPED neighborhoods. (8) TA מרכז גולדשטיין-גורן (WITHOUT קהילתי — distinct from the fixed Kiryat-Shalom מרכז קהילתי string!): ballots 326.x vote rh 17.7 in a rh-73 hood; crosscheck alt = old-north cluster (32.08591,34.77185) — approximate, 2006-address-cluster based. (9) Ashdod בי"ס ממ"ד מירון: crosscheck alt (31.80194,34.66406), voters rh 88 Shas = old-rova ✓ (no MOE entry; alt+profile). (10) KS בית הנוער ע"ש לזרוס: listed רמז 44 שכ' עלייה/אליעזר (nominatim 32.18823,34.90412), voters rh 79 vs north-KS hood 27 (Waze shows a פרוג 1 branch = the wrong current spot). CLEARED: Ashdod בי"ס ממלכתי צמח (MOE 10m — state-school building serving Haredi-rova voters), J-m sharp-boundary flags (עבדאללה בן-אלחוסיין, בית צפאפה, הרובע היהודי — real adjacency), Arab-school flags in Ramla/Lod (real segregation). OPEN: בי"ס שורשים TA (weak name match), J-m ויצ"ו בית הכרם/היובל/אולפנת צביה יצירתית, Haifa אשכול גנים/חוגים, Givat-Shmuel בן גוריון, Rosh-HaAyin עירייה/גן ניצבא, Rehovot ת"ת הראם, sem-2660 רמות ויצמן.
_verification_2026_07_06c: FULL national venue sweep (user request 'check all across the country'): 148 flags (K24∪K25, |Δrh|≥35 vs 6-nearest ≤1.5km OR isolated, ≥250 votes) → automated cascade = MOE registry (acc גבוהה+) + PROFILE-COHERENCE GATE (move must cut |venue_rh − local_hood_rh| by ≥15pp to residual ≤20pp — the Amiel-disambiguation logic, automated). 23 auto-CONFIRMED (below; incl. PT גורדון + PT אלונים which match K17-crosscheck alts to ~200-300m = double-confirmed; Rosh-HaAyin gan cluster רותם/שמש/שביט/אפק moved old-city→new-neighborhoods; Akko אל-מנארה Arab school out of Jewish hood; מתנ"ס רכסים was 114km(!) away). +3 manual: TA בי"ס עמל טכנולוגי (USER-REPORTED: Cain matched עמל ליידי-דיוויס Neot Afeka; real = Jaffa, K17-crosscheck alt 32.05712,34.75772; string exists K16-K24, gone K25), J-m בית ספר ויצ"ו בית הכרם (rh 27 in rh-75 hood; moved to Beit-HaKerem school cluster 31.77835,35.19123 — neighborhood-level accuracy), Nazareth בי"ס אורט (isolated garbage coord; crosscheck alt 32.68800,35.27365). CLEARED: לב-רן (semel 195 = KADIMA-TZORAN not Yehud — dot correct), RG ויצמן קרית קריניצי (registry 130m, city-edge isolation), Rehovot ת"ת הראם (150m), Ashdod צמח, KS מפתן, Herzliya נוף-ים pair, Ramla אלאמל/אלהודא + Lod אל-זהרא (Arab schools in place = real segregation boundaries), Akko/Tarshiha matnasim, יהוד שדות, RaSh מאיר דורון. OPEN (~100, mostly no-registry clubs/Arab-sector or sharp-boundary J-m): top = J-m עבדאללה בן-אלחוסיין/היובל/ישיבת נעם/מורשה/הרובע היהודי (likely real boundaries), Lod אלראזי/מעוז-חיים/בית-יעקב cluster, יבנה רמות ויצמן, Givat-Shmuel בן גוריון, Rosh-HaAyin עירייה/קתרוס, Rishon נעמת-תימון, TA שורשים/גוונים/המשותף, קרול PT (still unresolved address-vs-registry).
_verification_2026_07_06d: TA בי"ס מגן (USER-REPORTED: 'I remember a polling place in Maoz Aviv'; ballots 37/38/41 old numbering, 38.1-38.4 in K24/K25, string identical K16-K25): Cain venue-matched to (32.058808,34.783362) = SA 50000816, south-central TA, ~6.7km from the real school. PROFILE-SILENT mis-geocode — venue votes rh 7-17 secular-liberal AND the wrong SA is also secular (rh 10.3 פה), so neither census-contradiction nor winner-vs-hood detectors could ever flag it; found only by resident memory. Confirmed by TWO independent sources: (1) MOE registry semel_mosad 511576 'מגן' acc 'very high' (32.113230,34.814250) — the ONLY school named plain מגן in TA; (2) 2006 CEC address for K17 ballots 370/380/410 = 'קדש ברנע 4' = Maoz Aviv's main street (period-true). Fix lands in SA 50000214 (2022 geo) / 50000213 (2009 geo), previously a census-only stub (pop 2,380) — Maoz Aviv finally gets its own venue. NOTE: 'אשכול גנים-כניסה מגן מאיר' (K24, ballots 445.x, Gan Meir area 32.0918,34.7743) is a DIFFERENT institution — untouched.
_verification_2026_07_06e: MOE audit of the K17-crosscheck suspects (the PROFILE-SILENT class, run after the Magen find; analysis/audit_crosscheck_suspects.py over crosscheck_suspects.json, modern-era scope per user: venues alive in K21-25). Evidence bar per venue = TWO independent sources: an in-city MOE registry candidate (accuracy gvoha+) within 0.6 km of the 2006-CEC-address cluster, while the current map coordinate sits >=1.5 km away. 39 CONFIRMED (added below, ~50k votes/election, med displacement 1.5-7.2 km); 12 CLEARED as 2006->2009 renumbering FPs (registry <=0.3 km from current); 90 MANUAL residue (no registry entry: clubs/matnasim/gans/municipal buildings/Arab-sector name variants, or ambiguous candidates incl. the long-open PT karol). Full lists in crosscheck_audit.json. These were invisible to ALL profile-based detectors by construction (same-demographic displacement).
_verification_2026_07_06f: OFFICIAL K25 kalpi-locations file (user-provided, CEC 27-10-2022, kalpiplaces_kalpieslist_27-10.xlsx: 11,707 ballots with official venue name + street address) resolved the crosscheck manual pile (analysis/resolve_suspects_k25.py -> k25_resolution.json). Applied: confirm_2006 rows where the official 2022 address matches the official 2006 address (or its Nominatim geocode lands <=0.5km from the 2006 cluster) — venue never moved, fix = the 2006-address cluster (incl. PT karol Habanim-5 which the MOE registry had wrong, RG Shaul-Avigur, Herzliya Jabotinsky, Rishon Kiryat-Ganim, Haifa Gil, TA Pikuah-Ironi-Merkaz, J-m Noam/Ish-Shalom/Pisgat-Zeev-TALI...); plus confirm_new rows where the official 2022 address geocodes (in-city PIP) to a THIRD location = venue relocated post-2006 (TA Druyanov->HaNagarim 23, Pikuah-Tzafon->Har-Nevo 19, Nazareth deaf-school + Khaled-Suliman, Kiryat-Ata Yad-LeBanim) — NOTE these relocation fixes are era-approximate for K18-K20 (user scope: modern first). EXCLUDED from auto-apply: 17 Arab-sector rows where both official addresses are city-only (Maghar/Tamra/Shefaram/Tira/Jadeidi/Kafr-Kanna) — the 2006 'cluster' is a town centroid, not evidence; returned to the manual pile. 3 venues CLEARED (2022 geocode ~= current: Kafr-Qasim al-Ghazali, Kafr-Qara Hawarna, Rahat Sheikh-Khamis).
_verification_2026_07_06g: FULL K25 official-address sweep (analysis/sweep_k25_official.py over the CEC kalpiplaces file): geocoded 2,657 unique official addresses (Nominatim, in-city PIP; cache k25_address_geocodes.json), compared every street-addressed K25 venue (2,858; 1,231 city-only exempt) to its current map coordinate. 1,992 agree <=1.5km. 211 flags -> 40 AUTO-CONFIRMED (added below: an in-city MOE registry name-match sits <=0.3km from the official-address geocode while the current coordinate is >=1.5km away — two independent sources; incl. post-2006 venues invisible to the 2006-crosscheck: PT Uzi-Hitman 2,541v 4.1km, B7 Menachem-Begin 3,077v 4.2km, Herzliya Shazar 4.4km, TA Ayalon/David-Bloch, Afula Alon x2, J-m Siach-Sod, Haifa Herzl + Tichon-Kiryat-Haim 7.3km...). 5 cleared (registry ~= current; geocode = street-name collision). 166 MANUAL residue in k25_official_sweep.json (no/ambiguous registry, Arab-sector code-streets; 610 addresses failed geocoding). NEXT-TIER IDEA (not executed): confirm at the REGISTRY point when the name-match is unique-in-city and both sources reject the current coordinate even if they disagree >0.3km with each other (e.g. J-m Ateret-Rachel 4,002v) — needs namesake care.
_verification_2026_07_06h: Tiers 2+3 over the official-sweep manual pile (both rules = USER insights, 2026-07-06 night). TIER-2 (36 fixes, resolve_sweep_tier2.py): the official CEC address alone suffices when Nominatim resolves the EXACT house number (building-level geocode, in-city PIP, current >=1.5km away) — no registry needed; incl. J-m Yeshivat-Noam 2,705v, Netanya Tachkemoni 2,511v, TA ORT-Geula, TA Ironi-22 8.7km(!), Ironi-23 7.6km, Beit-HaSefer-HaMeshutaf 5.8km (long-open case). TIER-3 (62 fixes, resolve_sweep_tier3.py): street-only/street-level addresses — fetch the street's GEOMETRY from Nominatim, PIP its vertices into the city's SAs; if the WHOLE street lies in ONE statistical area, the SA is certain regardless of house number; fix = median in-SA street vertex (user: 'most likely that street lies inside a single statistical area' — 62/130 did). +1 cleared same-SA (Arad Tapuach-Pais: point imprecise but SA right). RESIDUE 67: streets spanning 2-7 SAs (46), no street geometry (21+6 partial) — k25_tier3.json 'manual'. Official-sweep flag ledger: 211 flags -> 39 (registry) + 36 (house-precise) + 62 (single-SA street) = 137 CONFIRMED, 6 cleared, 67 open.
_verification_2026_07_06i: Hashmonaim (semel 3770) — USER-REPORTED ('Ramat Gan - where is bi"s mamad Ramat Modiin?'): Cain's settlement-level geocode for the yishuv matched REHOV HaHashmonaim in RAMAT GAN (32.0823,34.8113) — the ENTIRE settlement (~1,700 votes/election, rh 90-95%) sat inside secular central RG in every era K18-K25. Structurally invisible to all detectors: only venue of its semel (no same-city comparison) AND semel 3770 has no SA polygons in any of our geometries (registry PIP always failed; official-sweep address 'HaCarmel' street-only). Fix = MOE registry 'רמת מודיעין' acc very-high (31.929715,35.022616) — the real school in Hashmonaim, ~18 km away. Third user-spotted catch of the day (Magen, the address-tier insight, Hashmonaim).
_verification_2026_07_06j: Foreign-venue sweep (analysis/detect_foreign_venues.py — the Hashmonaim class, built after the user found the yishuv's school sitting in Ramat Gan): a venue PIPing into ANOTHER city's SA while its own city's polygons are >3km away = cross-city geocode collision (settlement-name matched a street elsewhere, kibbutz clubs landed regions away, Arab-sector namesakes: Ibtin school in Umm Batin 166km, Hashmonaim-class settlements in PT/Netanya/Beit-Shean/Arad). 36 flags (~25k votes/election); SA layers were protected by same-semel snapping — the dots/panels were not. AUTO-FIXED those whose own locality is SINGLE-SA: placed at the polygon's interior point (SA-correct by construction, tier-3 logic). Multi-SA owners left manual (listed in the printout: shagur 516 x2, yanuh-jat 473, isfiya 300 x2, kiryat-shmona-area...).
_verification_2026_07_06k: 2026-07-06k — the GAN-DEKEL SUB-1.5KM CLASS (user report: Or-Yehuda גן דקל sits on רחוב דקל 7 — the geocoder matched the venue NAME to the street name — instead of official כצנלסון 18, 0.96km away in a different SA; invisible to the 1.5km sweep threshold). analysis/resolve_sa_mismatch.py swept every K25 venue whose current SA differs from its official-address-geocode SA and confirmed fixes by the established ladder: tier-2 = Nominatim returns the EXACT house number of the official address (+road token match, in-city PIP); tier-3 = street geometry lies >=80% inside exactly ONE SA that differs from the current one (fix = median in-SA vertex). Existing hand fixes never auto-overridden. Also merged: confirms from the re-run >1.5km sweep ladder (k25_tier2/k25_tier3) after the שד' geocode-query bug fix rescued 554 previously-failed addresses.
_verification_2026_07_06l: User report #3 tonight: גן ילדים הדס (קרית אתא, kalpi 39, 520 valid) drawn 2.4km east of its official address שד' בית וגן 7 (Cain venue-name geocode; SA 68000011 instead of the בית וגן area). Survived every automated ladder honestly: Nominatim has no house 7, and the street query matched the NEIGHBORHOOD (OSM names the road 'בית וגן' without the שד' prefix -> no highway geometry). Fixed at the MOE-registry kindergarten 'הדס' point (acc 'גבוהה מאוד', 32.798852/35.104388), which reverse-geocodes to road=בית וגן, suburb=בית וגן -> SA 68000043. Corroboration: kalpi-number cluster — kalpiot 33-45 all sit in the western בית וגן cluster (SAs 22/23/31/32/34/42/43), only 39 jumped east; plus the user's local knowledge. Secondary lesson for the sweep: when a 'שד X' address fails, also try the bare street name X — OSM often omits the prefix.
